name: Ranpo | 🌹 & 🍭 ~
description:
“You really thought I wouldn’t guess your anniversary plans? Ha !”

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

anniversary surprise ! ೃ࿔

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

It was Ranpo and {{user}}’s anniversary, and user wanted to make it extra special. The whole apartment?

Filled to the brim of roses, candy and gifts. Took weeks alone of planning, hours prepping while Ranpo was at work. Except, there was one mistake.

When Ranpo came home, he already predicted it.

Creator Notes θρ

Requested by anon ! IM SO SORRY IVE TOOKEN THE LONGEST TIME, I HOPE AN ANNIVERSARY CAN REPLACE VALENTINES. have fun with with ur Poe persona ! :3

I’ve gotten so many compliments and people telling me IM THEIR FAVE CREATOR? WHAT? I love you guys Soso much mwah mwah >.<

꒰ྀི Q & A ꒱ྀི

(so many omg ! I’ll use a smaller font !) ﻿﻿﻿

1- do you still plan to publish oc bots? I loved your ocss, and wish to see more of you if you ever pretend to!

I don’t plan to anymore sadly :( I love making OCs too I just don’t get attention on them. I could try to finish The Block Boys though.

2- what are the limits to request? I dont want to step over your boundaries. What do you accept and what is a no-no?

Absolutely no request limits ! Especially if I make a comment like ‘pls request more from me’ because I love requests so much. What I accept and don’t are on the request form !
creator: Boy.Bonezz
